MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos and Mars Goodman, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Jan A. Kopczynski, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, 1655 Chestnut Street Homeowners Association, A California corporation.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Nathan A. Prodromou,
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Declarations admitted into evidence.
Witness: Terin Atkins Sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Judgment in favor of Plaintiff 1655 Chestnut Street Homeowners Association and against Defendant Nathan A. Prodromou.

It is hereby ordered, adjudged, and decreed that judgment be, and hereby is entered against defendant Natha A. Prodromou, in the amount of $35,092.59.

Judgment signed in open court.
